author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Shipped in c9e920c3. Live API confirms detection works — forecast-bio/imaging shows 'agent_missing' (matching the release_lock failure the audit log surfaced), forecast-bio/atdata and 7 other track-all'd clones show 'not_initialized', the 5 properly-set-up repos (crosslink, ferrotorch, OpenClaudia, feral, tabular) show 'ready'.

Two remediation paths both work end-to-end:
• At clone time: Settings → GitHub → tick 'Initialize cloned repos', enter agent id, Track All. Backend runs crosslink init + crosslink agent init in each clone before registering.
• After the fact: /project/<slug> shows an amber InitBanner at the top when not ready with an inline agent-id input + Initialize button that hits POST /w/{slug}/init.

The Alerts page now hides action buttons on non-ready projects and shows a NotReadyNotice pointing to the project detail page's init banner, so users don't click Close/Release/Steal and watch nothing happen like before.

Tests: 5 new write_capability unit tests + 1 new SettingsGithub integration test; full backend projects 23/23, frontend 99/99 (both under ulimit safety cap).
